channel.title: Antivirus on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Antivirus on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted Antivirus & Malware Scanning Tools for Linux Servers in 2026
item.description: Running your own servers means taking responsibility for their security. While firewalls and intrusion detection systems protect against network-level threats, you also need on-host malware scanning to catch malicious files, rootkits, and trojans that bypass perimeter defenses.
